Title: Best Weapons | Resident Evil Requiem (RE9)

URL Source: http://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/582266

Published Time: 2026-02-27 04:26:07 -0500

Markdown Content:
![Image 1: Resident Evil Requiem (RE9) - Best Weapons](https://img.game8.co/4426713/d91be4482e2c95e7944f497f26051b75.png/show)

This is a guide to the best weapons in Resident Evil Requiem (RE9). Find out the best loadout and the best weapons for Grace and Leon.

| Jump to a section! |
| --- |
| [![Image 2: Grace Ashcroft](https://img.game8.co/4413485/42c5ed79a3fe2159ad165f9c2ad67002.png/show)Best Weapons for Grace](http://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/582266#hm_1) | [![Image 3: Leon Kennedy](https://img.game8.co/4413486/d30dbda6850ab396f8e27a876e8bff47.png/show)Best Weapons for Leon](http://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/582266#hm_2) |

| Best Weapon | Weapon Strengths |
| --- | --- |
| [![Image 4: S&S M232](https://img.game8.co/4425929/0e4ab7a93967bce7c8153733f2e54bad.png/show)S&S M232](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583461) | ・Its base stats surpass those of [B934](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583448), and outperforms it in every aspect. * * * **When Obtained:** At the Bar and Lounge in the Care Center West Wing |
| [![Image 5: Requiem](https://img.game8.co/4425903/6c9013d8ee913d749dc60d657939cbd2.png/show)Requiem](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583459) | ・High Stopping power. ・Penetrates through multiple targets. |
| [![Image 6: Kotetsu](https://img.game8.co/4429450/e20bf84b5ac8d6802350c33813e27e63.png/show)Kotetsu](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583693) (Post-Game) | ・A melee weapon that does not break. |

| [![Image 7: S&S M232](https://img.game8.co/4425929/0e4ab7a93967bce7c8153733f2e54bad.png/show)S&S M232](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583461) |
| --- |
| Power | Stability | Precision | Rate of Fire |
| 1.1 | 2.5 | 2.3 | 2.3 |
| Reload Speed | Ammo Capacity | Durability |
| 2.5 | 9 | 0 |

The **S&S M232** is the best handgun that Grace can use, a straight up upgrade over the [B934](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583448). After taking stabilizers, you can consistently **stagger** normal zombies with a well-placed shot to any weak point, guaranteeing a melee follow-up.

You can find it relatively early in the game, at a counter in **Care Center's Bar and Lounge**, which is located in the West Wing.

[S&S M232 Location](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583461)

| [![Image 8: Requiem](https://img.game8.co/4425903/6c9013d8ee913d749dc60d657939cbd2.png/show)Requiem](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583459) |
| --- |
| Power | Stability | Precision | Rate of Fire |
| 4.3 | 0.5 | 0.8 | 0.8 |
| Reload Speed | Ammo Capacity | Durability |
| 0.8 | 5 | 0 |

The Requiem is Grace's best option when things get hairy. It offers high damage and penetration, but it re-centers slowly due to Grace's inexperience with weapons.

Though it should be used sparingly, its reliability is unmatched, as it can kill most zombies with a single shot, and can reliably stun [The Girl](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583273).

[How to Get Requiem Bullets](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583452)

| [![Image 9: Kotetsu](https://img.game8.co/4429450/e20bf84b5ac8d6802350c33813e27e63.png/show)Kotetsu](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583693) (Post-Game) |
| --- |
| Power | Stability | Precision | Rate of Fire |
| 1 | 0 | 0 | 0 |
| Reload Speed | Ammo Capacity | Durability |
| 0 | 0 | 5 |

The Kotetsu is the best knife for Grace due to the simple fact that it **never breaks**. This means Grace can swing the Kotetsu as much as she wants without needing to craft more knives or pick them up.

| Best Weapon | Weapon Strengths |
| --- | --- |
| [![Image 10: Silencer 9](https://img.game8.co/4426496/fc8e85b2426048e6a41bc6793e02f2e1.png/show)Silencer 9](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583512) | ・Great stats that gets better with upgrades. ・High ammo capacity. * * * **When Obtained:** Bought from the Supply Box in East Raccoon City |
| [![Image 11: 990-TAC](https://img.game8.co/4426497/dda819fb22a94919b5f396fd70b570c8.png/show)990-TAC](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583513) | ・Semi-Auto makes it the fastest firing shotgun available. ・Incredibly tight spread. * * * **When Obtained:** Bought from the Supply Box in East Raccoon City |
| [![Image 12: Classic 70](https://img.game8.co/4426247/f83ab9f5fa878f23abf0cf6f8f5159bb.png/show)Classic 70](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583511) | ・Highest damage per shot, resulting in efficient ammo consumption * * * **When Obtained:** Automatically obtained in Leon's section of Care Center Courtyard |
| [![Image 13: Clatter Carbine](https://img.game8.co/4428864/4d01e110cc430ca75792e36bc04faad7.png/show)Clatter Carbine](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583694) (Post-Game) | ・Highest stats for submachine guns. |
| [![Image 14: Ghost Grudge](https://img.game8.co/4428862/7d5309d7c32069606ca0585b42d1fbec.png/show)Ghost Grudge](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583695) (Post-Game) | ・Re-Centers faster than the Requiem. ・Consumes less space. |
| [![Image 15: Mortal Edge](https://img.game8.co/4428863/1abbfd56f43dc74cf2a7a54bf15da6bc.png/show)Mortal Edge](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583692) (Post-Game) | ・Higher Base Stats ・More Lenient Parry WIndows |

| [![Image 16: Silencer 9](https://img.game8.co/4426496/fc8e85b2426048e6a41bc6793e02f2e1.png/show)Silencer 9](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583512) |
| --- |
| Power | Stability | Precision | Rate of Fire |
| 1.5 | 3 | 2.6 | 3.5 |
| Reload Speed | Ammo Capacity | Durability |
| 4 | 17 | 0 |

The Silencer 9 is the best handgun Leon can use when fully upgraded thanks to its balance of good **damage**, **stability**, and**instant centering speed**.

Its huge ammo capacity makes it perfect for dealing with numerous normal zombies, able to fire off multiple shots in quick succession without needing to re-center after every shot.

[Silencer 9 Location](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583512)

| [![Image 17: 990-TAC](https://img.game8.co/4426497/dda819fb22a94919b5f396fd70b570c8.png/show)990-TAC](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583513) |
| --- |
| Power | Stability | Precision | Rate of Fire |
| 3 | 1.8 | 2 | 2.3 |
| Reload Speed | Ammo Capacity | Durability |
| 1.5 | 9 | 0 |

The 990-TAC has a lot going for it, mainly its **semi-automatic feature**, which enables it to fire multiple shells, setting it apart from **pump-action**shotguns.

Additionally, the 990-TAC's purchasable upgrades provide the **tightest spread** among shotguns, making it a formidable weapon for **close** and **medium ranges**.

[990-TAC Location](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583513)

| [![Image 18: Classic 70](https://img.game8.co/4426247/f83ab9f5fa878f23abf0cf6f8f5159bb.png/show)Classic 70](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583511) |
| --- |
| Power | Stability | Precision | Rate of Fire |
| 3.1 | 2.5 | 4.5 | 0.5 |
| Reload Speed | Ammo Capacity | Durability |
| 0.5 | 6 | 0 |

The Classic 70 provides the highest damage per shot, at the cost of it's inherent bolt-action animation and slow reload speed.

It's attachable scope lets players snipe targets down range, while removing it and equipping the [BSAA charm](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583719) enables it to become a formidable close-range weapon, despite its drawbacks.

[Classic 70 Location](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583511)

| [![Image 19: Clatter Carbine](https://img.game8.co/4428864/4d01e110cc430ca75792e36bc04faad7.png/show)Clatter Carbine](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583694) (Post-Game) |
| --- |
| Power | Stability | Precision | Rate of Fire |
| 2 | 4.3 | 3.8 | 3.8 |
| Reload Speed | Ammo Capacity | Durability |
| 3 | 40 | 0 |

The Clatter Carbine is simply better than all the submachine guns available. It has the highest damage, stability, and precision of any submachine gun.

Its only downside is that it becomes available only after you finish the game once.

[Clatter Carbine Location](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583694)

| [![Image 20: Ghost Grudge](https://img.game8.co/4428862/7d5309d7c32069606ca0585b42d1fbec.png/show)Ghost Grudge](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583695) (Post-Game) |
| --- |
| Power | Stability | Precision | Rate of Fire |
| 4.5 | 2.3 | 2.5 | 3 |
| Reload Speed | Ammo Capacity | Durability |
| 1 | 0 | 0 |

Despite the Requiem having **marginally better** stats when fully upgraded, the Ghost Grudge beats the Requiem by having a much-faster centering speed.

This allows **Leon** to land more shots much faster during fights, especially during [boss](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/582585) battles where you have to**reposition often** to avoid attacks.

| [![Image 21: Mortal Edge](https://img.game8.co/4428863/1abbfd56f43dc74cf2a7a54bf15da6bc.png/show)Mortal Edge](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583692) (Post-Game) |
| --- |
| Power | Stability | Precision | Rate of Fire |
| 2.5 | 0 | 0 | 0 |
| Reload Speed | Ammo Capacity | Durability |
| 0 | 0 | 4 |

The **Mortal Edge** surpasses the [Hatchet](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583460) thanks to the combination of higher base stats, as well as having a much more **forgiving parry window**.

The Mortal Edge's parry is more lenient, which is invaluable given that Leon's combat sections include plenty of close-range combat encounters.

[Mortal Edge Location](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583692)

| [![Image 22: Redemption](https://img.game8.co/4428861/19d6d444c7b48b9af0971918dc9437f3.png/show)Redemption](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583696) (Post-Game) |
| --- |
| Power | Stability | Precision | Rate of Fire |
| 4.3 | 2.8 | 3.8 | 0.5 |
| Reload Speed | Ammo Capacity | Durability |
| 2 | 1 | 0 |

The Redemption is a powerful break-action pistol that can only fire one shot before needing to be reloaded. Despite this obvious drawback, it more than makes up for it with its **sheer firepower**.

Consequently, it is the perfect weapon to use with the [Power Shades](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583718) charm, as this increases its damage consistently without requiring you to wait for the last bullet, since there is only one round in the chamber.

[Redemption Location](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583696)

| [![Image 23: RPG-7](https://img.game8.co/4432649/ae2f11d1ec707d146353fd37f4c82750.png/show)RPG-7](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583698) (Post-Game) |
| --- |
| Power | Stability | Precision | Rate of Fire |
| 5 | 0 | 0 | 0 |
| Reload Speed | Ammo Capacity | Durability |
| 0 | 0 | 0 |

The RPG is back and fires a devastating rocket round that can take out most targets with a **single shot** and deal high damage to the surrounding area.

Its hefty price tag limits its usage, so it is best paired with [Infinite Ammo](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583736) once unlocked.

[RPG-7 Location](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583698)
